validation.urlHostInvalid: Only TickTick links from dida365.com or ticktick.com are supported.

errors.createFailed: Failed to create the TickTick task.
errors.documentUnavailable: The current document cannot be determined. Try again in a regular editable document.
errors.titleUnavailable: The document title could not be loaded. Enter a task title manually.
errors.insertFailed: Failed to insert the task block.
errors.attributeWriteFailed: Failed to write task attributes. The inserted block was rolled back.
errors.rollbackFailed: Failed to write task attributes and rollback failed. Manually inspect block ${blockId}.

taskEdit.noChanges: There are no changes to save.

errors.updateFailed: Failed to update the TickTick task.
errors.blockUnavailable: The current task could not be loaded.
errors.currentDataInvalid: The current task data is invalid and cannot be edited.
errors.conflict: This task was updated elsewhere. Close and reopen the editor before saving.
errors.contentUpdateFailed: Failed to update the task content.
errors.attributeWriteFailed: Failed to update task attributes. The task was left unchanged.
errors.rollbackFailed: The task update failed and the original content could not be restored. Manually inspect block ${blockId}.
